title: Custom eggless birthday cakes at Riverstone — Schofields, Marsden Park
summary:
Schofields and Marsden Park needed an eggless custom cake bakery. Riverstone Shopping Centre now has one.

Num Nums has been 100% eggless since 2019 — not most cakes, every cake. Six sizes, 15 flavours including Rasmalai and Mango. Any design. Buttercream, fondant, or ganache. Photo references welcome.

48-hour notice minimum. That's what fresh baking actually takes. Pickup from Shop 8, Riverstone Shopping Centre. Free car park. Open from 6am weekdays.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: no eggless custom cake near Schofields
